degree: Master of Science in Software Engineering

workExperiences.description: Led a team of 5 developers in migrating a monolithic legacy application to a microservices architecture using .NET 7/8 and Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS). Improved system latency by 40% and reduced deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes via automated CI/CD pipelines. Mentored junior developers and conducted rigorous weekly code reviews.

Developed and maintained highly scalable web applications using React on the frontend and C# ASP.NET Web API on the backend. Integrated third-party payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal) successfully handling $50k+ daily transactions. Optimized SQL queries resulting in a 30% faster data retrieval for the main reporting dashboard.
Assisted in the development of internal HR management tools. Wrote comprehensive unit tests using xUnit and Moq, increasing overall code coverage from 45% to 75%.

projects.description: Built a highly scalable e-commerce backend from scratch using CQRS and Event Sourcing patterns. Implemented an API Gateway using Ocelot, distributed caching with Redis, and secure identity management using Duende IdentityServer.

Created a real-time collaborative code editor allowing multiple users to edit the same file simultaneously. Utilized Operational Transformation (OT) algorithms to resolve live typing conflicts and integrated WebRTC for live audio communication.

extraCurricularActivities.description: Organize monthly tech meetups for local developers. Delivered talks on advanced C# 12 features, cloud-native design patterns, and application performance tuning to audiences of 100+ peers.
Actively contributing bug fixes and feature enhancements to popular .NET open-source repositories including Entity Framework Core and AutoMapper. Recognized as a top contributor in 2022.
